Document:
# Staff Shipyards
Standard Staff class ships
## Staff Shipyard Console
- Please fill out all the paperwork before purchase. you will need both the ship purchase document and the license to fly a ship at time of purchase. - After that you are going need to submit a five page document of why you should be flying a ship instead of sitting in the office provide by the station. - To finalize the purchase of said ship please invoice all ship purchase to your nearest person of even higher command. - Have all Documents and papers signed and stamped. - Wait 5-7 business days for confirmations before purchasing your ship. - Have the janitor fix the coffee maker the six time in a row this week. - Cry because the documents got denied due to one typo and redo steps 1-5.
[textlink="Command" link="Command"/]
